name: Pork w/ Blackberry Gastrique and Mango Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the salsa: In a bowl, stir together the salsa ingredients and salt to taste. Let stand, covered, at room temperature. The salsa may be made up to 2 hours in advance.
2. Make the gastrique: In a small saucepan, simmer the vinegar until reduced to about 3 tablespoons, about 3 minutes. Whisk in the preserves and salt, whisking until smooth. Keep warm, covered.
3. Season the pork chops with freshly ground pepper and salt to taste.
4. Melt 2 tablespoons unsalted butter in a heavy skillet over moderately high heat until foam subsides.
5. Cook the pork chops until golden brown on each side, about 3 minutes per side.
6. Continue cooking the pork chops, covered, over moderate heat until just cooked through, about 5 more minutes.
